title: Jal Shey meditation gloves
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Jal Shey meditation gloves''' were used by members of the [[Jal Shey]] order when engaged in meditation. They were greatly effective in increasing the user's awareness of their surroundings.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
